attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_XXCFIR_REVENUE_EXT_SUB_V)

attributes.Sql Query:

		STG_CG1_XXCFIR_REV_EXT_SUB_V.NUM_ATTRIBUTE57, STG_CG1_XXCFIR_REV_EXT_SUB_V.NUM_ATTRIBUTE58,

FROM	
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_XXCFIR_REV_EXT_SUB_V STG_CG1_XXCFIR_REV_EXT_SUB_V,
 (
 select  TRANSACTION_ID ,APPLICATION_ID,ATTRIBUTE2,REFRESH_DATETIME 
from	$$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_XXCFIR_REV_EXT_SUB_V
 minus
 select  TRANSACTION_ID ,APPLICATION_ID,ATTRIBUTE2,REFRESH_DATETIME 
from	$$NRTACCUMDB.CG1_XXCFIR_REVENUE_EXT_SUB_V
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.APPLICATION_ID = STG_CG1_XXCFIR_REV_EXT_SUB_V.APPLICATION_ID 
	and	ACM.TRANSACTION_ID=STG_CG1_XXCFIR_REV_EXT_SUB_V.TRANSACTION_ID 
	and	ACM.ATTRIBUTE2=STG_CG1_XXCFIR_REV_EXT_SUB_V.ATTRIBUTE2 
	and	ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG1_XXCFIR_REV_EXT_SUB_V.REFRESH_DATETIME
